title: Step 2: Run the Program to Find the washer and Move to it
description:
Step 2: Run the Program to Find the washer and Move to it

Step 2: Run the Program to Find the Washer and Move to it

Click the [Run]
	 button on the Epson RC+ 8.0 main toolbar.  This will cause the
	 program to be compiled and then open the Run window.

Click the [Start]
	 button on the Run window.

Your program will
	 now find the washer and move the robot to it.  After you successfully
	 find the washer, try moving the washer a little and then click the
	 [Yes] button in the dialog box that asks if you would like to run
	 another cycle.  If the washer is not found, a different dialog
	 box will appear asking whether you would like to try again.  Clicking
	 [No] in either dialog box will cause the program to stop running.
